/content/dam/campaigns/spring-promo-2025.heroHeadline: Spring into Savings: Up to 40% Off
/content/dam/campaigns/spring-promo-2025.subtitle: Our biggest sale of the season starts now
/content/dam/campaigns/spring-promo-2025.bodyCopy: We've curated our best offers just for you. From wardrobe refreshes to home upgrades, discover everything you need to make this spring unforgettable. Offers are available for a limited time only — don't miss out.

featuredOffer.headline: Spring Bundle Deal
featuredOffer.description: Get 3 items for the price of 2 across our entire spring collection. No code needed.

/content/dam/campaigns/welcome-series-1.bodyCopy: Thanks for joining us. As a new member, you'll be the first to hear about exclusive deals, new arrivals, and members-only events. We're thrilled to have you.
